title: Sk1llz Client
description: Sk1llz Client is a PvP-focused Minecraft client for smooth FPS, controls, and competitive gameplay.
body:
**SwiftFPS+** is a performance-optimized Minecraft modpack designed to boost FPS, reduce lag, and make the game run smoother and more stable on all types of PCs. It improves memory usage, optimizes game processes, and enhances chunk loading so you get faster performance and a more responsive gameplay experience, even on low or mid-range systems.

This modpack keeps Minecraft lightweight and efficient by focusing only on performance improvements, helping you get higher FPS without changing the core gameplay feel.

**How to use it:**

1. Download and install the modpack from Modrinth.
2. Open your Minecraft Launcher (Fabric/Forge/required loader).
3. Select the SwiftFPS+ profile.
4. Click Play and enjoy smoother FPS and reduced lag.
